market_pulse: Competitive landscape quiet midweek; weekend momentum building with multi-venue talent announcements (Zouk: RL Grime, Medusa; LIV: BTC kickoff; OMNIA: Latin Sundays rotation).

content_gaps.description: Behind-the-scenes prep and crew spotlights missing from LIV feeds vs. competitor daily stories.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch 3-5 TikTok/Reel series: 'Day in the Life at LIV' featuring sound tech, bar setup, host interviews pre-event.

content_gaps.description: User-generated dance challenges and TikTok trends under-leveraged; competitors gaining engagement with viral audio syncs.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create week-themed TikTok challenge with branded audio; incentivize reposting with guestlist rewards.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA and Zouk using 48h/24h countdown templates; LIV relying on traditional event posts.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Adopt 48-hour countdown Reel template + Instagram Stories poll: 'Which artist are you most hyped for?'

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest review of LIV Nightclub experience as guest list attendee. High engagement (591 likes, 61 comments) on Friday feature.
Featured Tao Beach dayclub experience with rooftop pool party content. Drives awareness to competing venue.

liv_outreach_targets.suggested_approach: DM with offer: free VIP table + guestlist for upcoming John Summit or headliner event.
